page.descriptionCreate: create a new list item under a category, manufacturer or model.

pageHeader.title: lists
pageHeader.description: manage system lists such as asset types, asset groups, priorities, statuses, and severities.

info.title: What are System Lists?
info.description: System Lists are categorized collections of predefined values used throughout MapexOS. They provide consistency and standardization for asset classification, prioritization, and status tracking.

types.title: List Categories
types.text: Asset Types, Asset Groups, Priorities, Statuses, and Severities - each serving specific classification needs

hierarchy.title: Hierarchical Structure
hierarchy.text: Support parent-child relationships for complex categorization (e.g., Manufacturer → Device Type)

systemLists.title: System Lists
systemLists.text: Pre-built lists provided by MapexOS, visible to all organizations but read-only

customLists.title: Custom Lists
customLists.text: Create organization-specific list items tailored to your operational requirements

templates.title: Shared Templates
templates.text: Share list items across organizations as templates for standardization

empty.title: no list items found
empty.description: it seems there are no list items matching your current search criteria or you don't have any list items yet.

confirmDelete.title: confirm deletion
confirmDelete.message: are you sure you want to delete the list item "{name}"?

notifications.systemListEdit: system list items cannot be edited
notifications.systemListDelete: system list items cannot be deleted
notifications.sharedListEdit: shared list items from other organizations cannot be edited
notifications.sharedListDelete: shared list items from other organizations cannot be deleted

stepDescriptions.basicInfo: select the type and define the item identity

formDescriptions.basicInfo: lists are organized as a tree: category contains manufacturers, which contain models.
formDescriptions.isTemplate: shared list items propagate to child organizations as templates.

validation.valuePattern: use only lowercase letters, numbers and underscore

messages.completeAllSteps: complete all steps to save the list item
messages.systemListWarning: this is a system list item. it cannot be modified.
messages.typeLocked: the list type cannot be changed after creation
messages.noParentForCategory: categories sit at the top of the tree and have no parent

reviewStep.subtitle: review the list item configuration before saving
reviewStep.successMessage: ready to create! click 'create list item' to save
reviewStep.successMessageEdit: ready to update! click 'update list item' to save changes

notifications.alreadyExists: a list item with this value already exists in the selected parent
notifications.forbidden: you do not have permission to perform this action
